mapper.select: SELECT FROM ds_payment_order WHERE biz_no = #{bizNo} AND status IN ('PAID', 'PARTIAL_REFUNDED') ORDER BY create_time ASC
mapper.sql: id, order_no, customer_no, wallet_no, amount, platform, payment_method, third_party_order_no, third_party_transaction_no, payment_params, callback_data, status, paid_time, expire_time, notify_url, return_url, ext, remark, biz_no, biz_type, create_time, update_time
mapper.select: SELECT FROM ds_payment_order WHERE status = 'PENDING' AND biz_no = #{bizNo} ORDER BY create_time DESC, id DESC LIMIT 1
SELECT FROM ds_payment_order WHERE biz_no = #{bizNo} ORDER BY create_time DESC, id DESC LIMIT 1
mapper.update: UPDATE ds_payment_order SET third_party_order_no = #{thirdPartyOrderNo}, third_party_transaction_no = #{thirdPartyTransactionNo}, payment_params = #{paymentParams}, update_time = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE order_no = #{orderNo}

UPDATE ds_payment_order SET status = #{status},
callback_data = #{callbackData},
third_party_transaction_no = #{thirdPartyTransactionNo},
paid_time = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
update_time = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE order_no = #{orderNo}

UPDATE ds_payment_order SET status = #{status},
callback_data = #{callbackData},
third_party_transaction_no = #{thirdPartyTransactionNo},
paid_time = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
update_time = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE order_no = #{orderNo} AND status = #{currentStatus}
mapper.select: SELECT FROM ds_payment_order WHERE customer_no = #{customerNo} ORDER BY create_time DESC
SELECT FROM ds_payment_order WHERE order_no = #{orderNo} FOR UPDATE
